title: GC GAVENO CAVAILIA King Size Fitted Sheet | Deep 25cm Polycotton Bed Sheet | Breathable & Smooth Easy Care Bedding with Elastic Corners | White Mattress Sheet - 150 x 200 cm
features: PRODUCT DIMENSIONS - King size fitted sheets measuring (150 x 200 cm) with a 25 cm (10 inch) depth, designed to perfectly fit a king mattress
PREMIUM MATERIAL COMPOSITION - Made from a durable 50% Cotton & 50% Polyester blend, this bedding set king size combines softness, comfort, and long-lasting strength.
SECURE ELASTIC CORNERS - The strong elastic all around ensures the king size bed sheet stays in place, providing a snug fit and effortless bed-making.
SUPER SOFT & SMOOTH - Crafted with tightly woven, high-density fine yarns for a luxuriously soft, smooth, and breathable finish - premium quality bedding & linen for everyday comfort.
EASY CARE INSTRUCTIONS - Machine washable at 40тДГ. Wash dark coloured bedsheets separately. Do not bleach. Tumble dry on low to maintain long-lasting freshness of your bedsheets.
